name: Solaria Nishitetsu Hotel Bangkok
detail: Overall, the service standards here are truly outstanding.

name: Townhouse Siam Privi Hotel
detail: My girlfriend and I stayed for more than 4 week, because the price and value was the best on Agoda. + best price (450 THB) + big (35 sm) bright rooms + led TV + new comfortable mattresses + very friendly stuff + 15 minutes walk to MRT Hui Kwang + lots of cheep massage, services and food around + night market Hui Kwang has a lot of good fruits and vegetables for best price + no smoking rooms + quite place =============================== - no sightseeing - if you don't like to walk, you should take a taxi or bike everytime you go somewhere =============================== After all, one of the best hotels for such price, no doubt we will recommend it, and enjoy it on our next visit to Bangkok

name: Palette The Travellers Hotel Bangkok
detail: It was great experience to stay with the property.

name: Grand BS Airport Hotel Suvarnabhumi
detail: Facilities like room and pool were perfect for family.

name: The Residence on Thonglor by UHG
detail: We loved our four night stay at The Residence and would strongly recommend to anyone looking for a comfortable, upscale stay in a nice quiet neighbourhood. The rooms were spacious and spotless with great facilities and a comfortable bed, and the kitchenette and washing machine came in very handy (only bummer was there was never enough hot water to have a bath, so we didn't get to use the gorgeous tub). Decent selection of English cable TV channels too. The rooftop pool area is awesome, and we spent most mornings after breakfast up there swimming and lying by the pool reading before heading out for the day. There is a great sauna and onsen but unfortunately it's only available for the men, so my boyfriend was loving it while i was pretty disappointed. There is also a water cooler in the gym area which helps if you're like us and want to limit your use of buying plastic water bottles. The breakfast is served in a hip cafe where you get high Western standard cafe meals like eggs benedict, french toast, lattes, etc, plus small buffet of extras, which was a highlight and one of the best breakfasts i've had a a hotel in Thailand. The location is about 20-30 mins walk from the BTS station, but it's a very pleasant walk with no touts, just a nice stroll through one of bangkoks more upscale neighbourhoods with plenty of massage, restaurant and street food options. Tuk tuk will take you from the hotel to the station, and coming back you can just jump on one of the motorcycle taxis which is a lot of fun and will only cost you 20 THB to the hotel door. Overall, this was our favourite hotel in Thailand during this trip over the Christmas period and we would definitely return, and highly recommend it.

name: Boss Suites Nana
detail: I haven't stayed in several hotels in Bangkok anyway, but these were the main features that I was looking for in a hotel. 1) Clean and fresh looking 2) Free fast wifi 3) Good breakfast 4) Friendly staff 5) Good location where it's happening for a Solo traveler like me. Boss suites has it all. It is just the best and is not too pricey. I wouldn't call it a 4 star but it is very clean and well maintained. Since it is a new hotel, the interior, decor etc are really attractive and well planned ( like the see through bathroom just in case u have one of those special guests :). It is still a good hotel for couples and families but not the location) The price through agoda was $41 as advertised but it will be $49 before checkout. That's Agoda not Boss suites. Most of the staff can speak fairly good English and extremely friendly. My experiences with the friendly staff are too many in the two days that I've stayed. There is not one improvement that I can suggest for this hotel and that is not an exaggeration. This definitely is value for money. You can rely on the staff for numerous things like free Tuk-Tuk (They got one for me even after hours), help with getting a cab, help with your room and facilities and also suggestions on going around in Bangkok at the reception. And ya, for all those fun loving, crazy young travelers like me , the hotel offers VIP massages for about 500 Baht. They are all professional masseurs but you can take the massage a litte further if you like to :)

name: The Quarter Saladaeng by UHG
detail: I plan to return to Siri Sathorn before I leave Thailand and will make it a base for future visits to Bangkok. Quiet location, but easy walk to shopping, nightlife, Saladaeng Station and beautiful Lumpini Park. You can get a free shuttle too. All staff were very attentive, helpful and delightful. When my adaptor caused a fuse to blow, repairmen arrived within a couple of minutes of reporting it to recception and it was fixed immediately .Buffet breakfast and lunch were great. Gym is well equipped. But the highlight for me was my deluxe room, which was very spacious and comfortable and had a kitchenette as well. I got an excellent deal, which made it extremely good value for money. I visited friends in a much pricier Bangkok hotel and came away feeling I had made the better choice. I will certainly recommend Siri Sathorn to other visitors to Bangkok.

name: Eleven Hotel Bangkok
detail: Very Disappointed!!! I just wished Agoda agency or Eleven Bangkok hotel that let’s us know they are under or just done with a renewal or under a construction . We walked in our bedroom with the smell of a new paint color everyday. Even walking in the hotel front desk still smell that bad color smell sometimes. Which it was very bad for my health!!! I booked this hotel because it’s close to a hospital and a good deal. I stayed at Eleven Bangkok hotel to go check for my health condition. On my Second day staying around 12-1:30 AM, I still heard a sound of construction until I called a front desk. Every thing was quite again. I booked this hotel from 12-19 August, but I have to leave 2 days early after I done with my doctor appointments. Cause this hotel condition made my health getting bad. Even though, their are a good staffs there to help eliminate our bedroom every day. However, I have to breathing and sleeping with new painting color everyday.

name: The Landmark Bangkok
detail: The property exceeded our expectations in every aspect.

name: The Quarter Silom by UHG
detail: Me and my GF decided to change the hotels everyday while we were visiting Bangkok. After we came to the Quater Silom we stopped moving to the other places. Really great place with a perfect location and kind staff. Would come and stay here again! Thanks to the management and to everyone who make this place to be as it is! 🙏
